CustomField.formula: ISBLANK(Development_address__c)=false && (RecordType.Name = 'Homeownership' || RecordType.Name = 'Rental Unit' )&& Exclude_From_Inventory__c = false && CONTAINS(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Status__c),'Available')&& TEXT(Development_address__r.Google_Tracker_Review__c) != ''&& TEXT(Development_address__r.Google_Tracker_Review__c) != 'No Review'&& Test_Property__c = false
CustomField.label: Active Property
